items.a: Yes — every Esports World Cup tournament streams for free on the Thamanya app, no subscription required.
Download the Thamanya app from the App Store or Google Play, then open the live section to catch the broadcast.
11 tournaments from July 7 to August 22, 2026 — including Dota 2, FC 26, Fortnite, PUBG Mobile, Rocket League, Chess, and more.
Yes — Arabic commentary plus companion shows, recaps, and discussions made for the community.

items.q: I missed a match — can I catch up?
items.a: Absolutely. Recaps and highlights are available on the app right after every match.

footer.closingTitle: Watch Live on the Thamanya App
